creator: okazaki@be.to
text:
Update of the japanese/groff port to
	jgroff-0.100 based on groff-1.15.

Fix: Added and removed files for this update:

	add     files/eucJP files/locale-list
                patches/patch-af patches/patch-ag
                patches/patch-ah patches/patch-ai

	remove  patches/patch-aa patches/patch-ac
                patches/patch-ad patches/patch-ae

How-To-Repeat: 
	Use the patch below to update the port. [TM by Will :-)]
